title: U.S. interest rates: 10-year lookup - Bank of Canada
content:
## U.S. interest rates: 10-year lookup
On this page, you can look up series data. For metadata and background information, see the series notes .
- Series frequency: Daily series show values for each business day. Weekly series values are as at Wednesday. Monthly series show values for the last Wednesday of each month.
- Daily series show values for each business day.
- Weekly series values are as at Wednesday.
- Monthly series show values for the last Wednesday of each month.
- Where applicable, each series shows its CANSIM 'V' identifier.
- For rates prior to the past ten years, please refer to CANSIM at Statistics Canada.
